mapper.update:
update base_platform_auth
state = #{state}, deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{modifiedName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate},
where id in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into base_platform_auth
id, config_code, config_name, owner_id, owner_code, owner_name, platform_code, platform_name, customer_id, vendor_id, app_key, app_secret, access_token, access_token_expired, refresh_token, group_id, service_provider_id, service_provider_name, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, modified_by, modified_name, modified_date, version, deleted_flag,
